title: A Comprehensive Flux Balance Analysis (FBA) Protocol for E. coli: From Foundational Concepts to Advanced Applications in Biomedical Research
description: A comprehensive guide and protocol for implementing Flux Balance Analysis (FBA) in E. coli, covering genome-scale models like iML1515, enzyme constraints, dynamic FBA, machine learning integration, and a case study on L-cysteine overproduction.
audience: Researchers and professionals in drug discovery, systems biology, and bioprocess development
